definitions.text: With little or no sound; free of disturbing noise.
examples: I can't hear the music; it is too quiet.

definitions.text: Having little motion or activity; calm.

examples: The traffic was quiet for a Monday morning.
Business was quiet for the season.

definitions.text: To cause (someone or something) to become quiet.
examples: Can you quiet your child? He’s making lots of noise.
The umpire quieted the crowd so the game could continue in peace.
When you quiet, we can start talking.
There was a strange quiet in the normally very lively plaza.
We need a bit of quiet before we can start the show.

definitions.text: The absence of movement; stillness, tranquility.
The absence of disturbance or trouble; peace, security.
